title: Event Promoter - live cooking (6 days / Office hours)
description:
Working days per week: 6 days (1 off day in weekdays)

Working hour: 9am to 6.30pm


  • Do live cooking demos at retail stores and events.
  • Help set up and pack up for monthly events and pop-ups, and assist with selling on-site.
  • Work with part-time promoters to give customers a good experience.
  • Send in sales reports after events, including sales numbers, customer feedback, and stock movement.
  • Suggest new event ideas like roadshows, fairs, or bazaars.
  • Handle simple admin work and fill out documents after events.
  • Work with retail partners to attract more customers and improve event results.
  • Keep track of sales and update the team with key information.
  • Help prepare demo tools, product displays, and event booths.
  • Share feedback and ideas after events to improve future ones.
  • Help with stock counts at retail stores and highlight items that are low or selling fast.
  • Learn product details well and explain them clearly to customers.
  • During quieter periods, support the marketing team with recipes or content for social media.
  • Do other tasks as needed to help the team and event run smoothly.

Job Requirements:

  • Experience in retail, events, or product demos — especially in kitchen or home products is a plus.
  • Friendly and confident when talking to people.
  • Responsible, independent, and focused on results.
  • Careful and organized, especially with admin and stock checks.
  • Can work well alone or with a team.
  • Comfortable using a computer for reports and emails.
  • Speaks good English; knowing other dialects is a bonus.
  • At least GCE N/O Level or similar; higher education is a plus.
  • Must be willing to work weekends, public holidays, and longer hours during busy events.
  • Okay with traveling around Singapore for events.
  • Physically able to help with setting up booths and carrying event items.
  • Experience in events, roadshows, or activations is a strong plus.
  • Basic cooking skills are helpful.
  • Looking for someone cheerful, energetic, and willing to learn and help out.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 20C0270
